en.name: Boggle
en.desc: Find words in a 4x4 letter grid — race against time! Free online Boggle, no download required.
en.description: Boggle is the classic word search game that has challenged vocabulary skills since 1972! Shake up the letter cubes and race against time to find as many words as possible hidden in a 4×4 grid of letters. Connect adjacent letters (including diagonals) to form words of 3 or more letters. Longer words score more points, so scan strategically and think fast! Play Boggle free online — no download or sign-up needed. 2-minute timer, unlimited rounds, straight in your browser.
en.objectives: Find as many valid words as possible within the time limit by connecting adjacent letters. Longer words earn more points. Beat your high score by expanding your vocabulary and improving your pattern recognition.
en.howToPlay: Click adjacent letters (horizontal, vertical, diagonal) to form words of 3+ letters. Each letter can only be used once per word. Longer words score more points.

rules.controls: Click on letters to select them, forming words by connecting adjacent squares. Submit your word or click elsewhere to deselect. Letters must be neighbors (including diagonals).
mechanics: Words must be 3 letters or longer
Letters must be adjacent (touching horizontally, vertically, or diagonally)
Each letter cube can only be used once per word
Same letter can appear multiple times in grid
Score based on word length: 3-4 letters = 1pt, 5 = 2pts, 6 = 3pts, 7+ = 5pts
features: Timed Challenge - Race against the clock
Score System - Longer words worth more
High Score Tracking - Beat your best

tips: Start with common letter patterns and prefixes (UN-, RE-, PRE-, DIS-)
Look for plural forms ending in S — an S tile next to common words is gold
Scan systematically through starting letters, row by row
Practice finding longer words for higher scores — 7+ letter words are worth 5 points each
Focus on 4-5 letter words first, then extend them to 6+ letters
Learn common 3-letter word patterns: ACE, AGE, ATE, EEL, ORE, OUT, USE
Check for -ED and -ING endings on any verb stem you find

faq.question: Can I use the same letter twice in one word?
faq.answer: No, each letter cube can only be used once per word. However, if the same letter appears in different positions on the board, you can use each occurrence.

faq.question: What's the best strategy for finding words?
faq.answer: Scan the board systematically, starting from each letter. Look for common prefixes (UN-, RE-, PRE-) and suffixes (-ING, -TION, -LY). Focus on vowel-rich areas of the grid where more word paths converge.

faq.question: Are proper nouns allowed?
faq.answer: Standard Boggle rules exclude proper nouns, abbreviations, and foreign words. Stick to common English words found in standard dictionaries.

faq.question: How do I find longer words?
faq.answer: Look for letter combinations that commonly appear together, like -TION, -UGHT, -OUGH. Practice recognizing patterns and word families. Longer words are worth more — a 7-letter word is worth 5 points, the top single-word score on this board.

faq.question: How is Boggle scored?
faq.answer: Points are awarded by word length: 3-4 letters = 1 point, 5 letters = 2 points, 6 letters = 3 points, 7+ letters = 5 points. Only unique words (not found by other players in multiplayer) count toward your score.

faq.question: What are the Boggle rules for adjacent letters?
faq.answer: Letters must be adjacent horizontally, vertically, or diagonally — up to 8 possible neighbors for any letter. You cannot skip over letters or reuse the same cube within a single word.

faq.question: Can I play Boggle online for free?
faq.answer: Yes! You can play Boggle free right in your browser — no download or sign-up required. Click adjacent letters to form words, race against the 2-minute timer, and try to beat your high score.

zh.name: 字母方阵
zh.desc: 在4x4字母网格中寻找单词
zh.description: 字母方阵（Boggle）是自1972年以来挑战词汇技能的经典单词搜索游戏！摇动字母立方体，限时内在4×4字母网格中找出尽可能多的隐藏单词。连接相邻字母（包括对角线）形成3个或更多字母的单词。更长的单词得分更多，所以要有策略地扫描并快速思考！
zh.objectives: 在时间限制内通过连接相邻字母找出尽可能多的有效单词。更长的单词获得更多分数。通过扩大词汇量和提高模式识别来打破你的最高分。
zh.howToPlay: 点击相邻字母（水平、垂直、对角线）形成3个以上字母的单词。每个字母在每个单词中只能使用一次。较长的单词得分更高。

rules.controls: 点击字母选中它们，通过连接相邻方格组成单词。提交你的单词或点击其他地方取消选择。字母必须是相邻的（包括对角线）。
mechanics: 单词必须有3个字母或更多
字母必须相邻（水平、垂直或对角线接触）
每个字母立方体在每个单词中只能使用一次
相同字母可以在网格中出现多次
得分基于单词长度：3-4字母=1分，5=2分，6=3分，7+=5分
features: 限时挑战 - 与时钟赛跑
得分系统 - 更长的单词更值钱
单词验证 - 字典检查
最高分追踪 - 打破你的最佳记录

tips: 从常见的字母模式和前缀开始（UN-, RE-, PRE-, DIS-）
寻找以S结尾的复数形式 — S旁边的常见单词是金矿
系统地扫描起始字母，逐行进行
练习找到更长的单词以获得更高的分数 — 7+字母单词每个值5分
先找4-5字母单词，再扩展到6+字母
学习常见的3字母单词模式：ACE, AGE, ATE, EEL, ORE, OUT, USE
检查找到的任何动词词干是否有-ED和-ING结尾

faq.question: 可以在一个单词中使用同一字母两次吗？
faq.answer: 不可以，每个字母立方体在每个单词中只能使用一次。但如果同一字母在棋盘不同位置出现，你可以使用每个出现。

faq.question: 找单词的最佳策略是什么？
faq.answer: 系统地扫描棋盘，从每个字母开始。寻找常见前缀（UN-, RE-, PRE-）和后缀（-ING, -TION, -LY）。重点关注元音丰富的区域，那里有更多单词路径汇合。

faq.question: 专有名词可以吗？
faq.answer: 标准字母方阵规则排除专有名词、缩写和外来词。坚持使用标准词典中的常见英语单词。

faq.question: 如何找到更长的单词？
faq.answer: 寻找经常一起出现的字母组合，如-TION、-UGHT、-OUGH。练习识别模式和词族。更长的单词得分更高 — 7字母单词值5分，是本棋盘上的单字最高分。

faq.question: 字母方阵的计分规则是什么？
faq.answer: 按单词长度计分：3-4字母=1分，5字母=2分，6字母=3分，7+字母=5分。只有独特的单词（其他玩家没找到的）才计入分数。

faq.question: 字母方阵中相邻字母的规则是什么？
faq.answer: 字母必须水平、垂直或对角线相邻 — 任何字母最多有8个可能的邻居。你不能跳过字母或在同一个单词中重复使用同一个立方体。

faq.question: 可以免费在线玩字母方阵吗？
faq.answer: 是的！你可以直接在浏览器中免费玩字母方阵 — 无需下载或注册。点击相邻字母组成单词，与2分钟计时器赛跑，挑战你的最高分。
